excluded.reason: Block has no dark mode variant — it is used in a 404 template with a single light layout
Block has no background image or media elements

extra.description: Verify mt-(--header-height) correctly offsets the block below the site header without overlap
Verify buttons with empty url and null postId do NOT render on frontend
Verify text-accent color is applied to heading and responds to page color scheme
Verify only one instance of the block can be inserted per template (multiple: false)
